zh.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldeston於大約1085年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓。她於大約1110年與Robert de Clayton II在英國藍卡爾利布斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldeston was born about 1085, in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert de Clayton II about 1110, in Ribchester, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1150, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldeston est née environ 1085, à Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Robert de Clayton II environ 1110, à Ribchester, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1150, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldeston wurde um 1085 in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1110 in Ribchester, Lancashire, England Robert de Clayton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldestonは約1085年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストンで生まれた。約1110年にイギリスランカシュアイアリブチェスターでRobert de Clayton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1150年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldeston(은)는 대략 1085년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스볼데스턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1110년 영국 랭카실르 리브체스터에서 Robert de Clayton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cabaldeston родилась около 1085 г. в местности осбалдестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Clayton II около 1110 г. в местности рибчестир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1150 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
